artPrompt: A toppled barrel gushing glowing murky-green sludge across cracked concrete, the spill splitting into creeping bioluminescent tendrils that swell over rusted pipes, its label a blank smudged smear, bubbling runoff and drifting litter under a bruised stormy sky, mutant overgrowth recoiling and thriving at once, the contamination rendered with tender eerie light, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Mutagenic Spill
text: Put four sludge counters distributed as you choose among creatures you control. Each creature that received a counter this way becomes a Mutant in addition to its other types and gains trample. Then roll a six-sided die; if you roll a 6, repeat this entire process once. The barrel was clearly labeled DO NOT. Somebody DID.
flavorText: Forty-seven barrels went into the reservoir in 1986. Forty-eight came back out.
